1965 Italian film

| I figli del leopardo | |

***I figli del leopardo*** (also known as *Sons of the Leopard*) is a 1965 [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") directed by [Sergio Corbucci](/wiki/Sergio_Corbucci "Sergio Corbucci") starring the comic duo [Franco and Ciccio](/wiki/Franco_and_Ciccio "Franco and Ciccio") that is a parody of *[The Leopard](/wiki/The_Leopard_(1963_film) "The Leopard (1963 film)")*.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=I_figli_del_leopardo&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

[Sicily](/wiki/Sicily "Sicily"), [1860](/wiki/1860 "1860"). The Baron Tulico is a penniless man and womanizer, who abandons his mistress Maria Rosa for a marriage of convenience. The two pharmacists Franco and Ciccio, called for help from Maria, try to put the baron's head in place, but do not have time, because the two are recruited into the army of [Giuseppe Garibaldi](/wiki/Giuseppe_Garibaldi "Giuseppe Garibaldi"). After many adventures Franco and Ciccio track the baron, and force him to recognize the two of them as his legitimate children.

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=I_figli_del_leopardo&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Franco Franchi](/wiki/Franco_Franchi "Franco Franchi") - Franco / Maria Rosa
* [Ciccio Ingrassia](/wiki/Ciccio_Ingrassia "Ciccio Ingrassia") - Ciccio / Baron Fifi
* [Evi Marandi](/wiki/Evi_Marandi "Evi Marandi") - Margherita
* [Raimondo Vianello](/wiki/Raimondo_Vianello "Raimondo Vianello") - General Baldigari
* [Alberto Bonucci](/wiki/Alberto_Bonucci "Alberto Bonucci") - Babalone
* [Anthony Steffen](/wiki/Anthony_Steffen "Anthony Steffen") - Tenente Garibaldino (as Antonio De Teffè)
* [Vittorio Congia](/wiki/Vittorio_Congia "Vittorio Congia") - Sgt. Nando Tazza
* [Silvio Bagolini](/wiki/Silvio_Bagolini "Silvio Bagolini") - Don Basilio
* [Nino Vingelli](/wiki/Nino_Vingelli "Nino Vingelli") -Farm manager
* [Mimmo Poli](/wiki/Mimmo_Poli "Mimmo Poli") - Farm manager
* [Mario Castellani](/wiki/Mario_Castellani "Mario Castellani")
* [Elisa Mainardi](/wiki/Elisa_Mainardi "Elisa Mainardi")
* [Ugo Bonardi](/w/index.php?title=Ugo_Bonardi&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ugo Bonardi (page does not exist)")
* [Eva Gioia](/w/index.php?title=Eva_Gioia&action=edit&redlink=1 "Eva Gioia (page does not exist)")
